basics.name: Avinesh P.V.S.
basics.label: Senior Research Scientist
basics.summary: Senior Research Scientist at Apple working on Siri's Natural Language Understanding. PhD in NLP and ML, with research in summarization, recommendation, and personalization.

work.name: Apple
work.summary: Working on NLP and machine learning for Siri Understanding (server and on-device).

work.name: Apple
work.summary: Developed a deep learning (seq2seq) system for international Knowledge Graph Question Answering.

work.name: RMIT Search Lab
work.summary: Research internship on Review Summarization and Recommendation.

work.name: IBM Watson
work.summary: Built NLU component for Watson Oncology Expert Advisor.

work.name: Lexical Computing Ltd.
work.summary: Developed Sketch Engine corpus tools for Machine Translation and Language Learners.

highlights: Research at UKP Lab/AIPHES on interactive personalized summarization, text compression, and personalized explainable recommendation.
Research at LTRC on NLP and Machine Translation.
Top 15% of the class with research in NLP.

projects.name: Indic Tagger
projects.summary: POS tagging, chunking, and NER for 9 Indian languages using CRF, BI-LSTM-CRF, and HMM models.
